title: City Council Public Comment
text:
## City Council Public Comment

Good evening, council. My name is {person}, and I live near the {place}.

I am here about the proposed {adjective} statue shaped like a {animal}.

For {number} weeks, residents have heard {sound} every time someone tries to {verb} past it.

Children are {emotion}, dogs are {verb ending in -ing}, and my {object} turned {color}.

Please fund more {plural noun} instead of another {adjective} {noun}, a {color} {vehicle}, or {number} ceremonial {food} carts.
